scripts.release:bump: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:sync
scripts.release:bump:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:sync
scripts.release:bump:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:sync
scripts.release:sync: node scripts/sync-version.js && git add -A && git commit -m "Release v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
